This module covers combinatorics.

```idris
module Main

import Hedgehog
import MSet1
import Base
import Combinatorics

genNode : Gen MSet1
genNode = do
  n <- nat (linear 1 3)
  pure $ fromNat n

genPix : Gen Pix
genPix = do
  a <- genNode
  b <- genNode
  pure $ MkPix a b

genMaxel : Gen Maxel
genMaxel = do
  -- Small size to naturally hit property intersections
  pixels <- list (linear 0 4) genPix
  pure $ MkMaxel pixels

prop_T_plus_Y_implies_R : Property
prop_T_plus_Y_implies_R = property $ do
  m <- forAll genMaxel
  if isTransitive m && isSymmetric m
     then isReflexive m === True
     else assert True 

genPoset : Gen Maxel
genPoset = pure diamondMaxel

prop_poset_properties : Property
prop_poset_properties = property $ do
  -- diamondMaxel is a strict poset
  m <- forAll genPoset
  isTransitive m === True
  isAntiSymmetric m === True
  isIrreflexive m === True

main : IO ()
main = do
  success <- checkGroup $ MkGroup "Ordered Structures"
    [ ("prop_T_plus_Y_implies_R", prop_T_plus_Y_implies_R)
    , ("prop_poset_properties", prop_poset_properties)
    ]
  if success
    then putStrLn "SUCCESS"
    else putStrLn "FAILURE"
```
